title: [Abuse] Warning: EXW Global AG
text: EXW Global AG has not been licensed by the FMA as a financial intermediary.   The Financial Market Authority Liechtenstein (FMA) points out that EXW Global AG, c/o CONFIDENTIA Treuhand Anstalt, Bergstrasse 10, 9490 Vaduz, registration number FL-0002.620.252-2, has not been licensed by the FMA.   In particular, it is not permitted to provide banking activities or payment services.
